name: io.github.eZhing/runik-ai
title: Runik AI
description: Chat-first business management. 40+ tools, 26 templates. Describe your business, done.

skills.name: business_report
skills.description: Generate an executive report of your business with KPIs, alerts and recommendations

arguments.name: period
arguments.description: Time period: today, week, month, quarter

skills.name: setup_business
skills.description: Describe your business and get a complete system with tables, views and sample data

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Your business description, e.g. 'hotel with 15 rooms' or 'dental clinic with 3 dentists'

skills.name: query_data
skills.description: Ask questions about your data in natural language

arguments.name: question
arguments.description: Your question, e.g. 'who owes me money', 'available rooms today', 'low stock items'

prompts.name: business_report
prompts.description: Generate an executive report with KPIs, metrics, alerts and next steps for your business

prompts.name: setup_business
prompts.description: Create a complete business system from a description. Generates tables, fields, relationships, views and sample data.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Describe your business: industry, size, what you need to manage

prompts.name: prepare_email
prompts.description: Draft a professional email using real data from your business

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: What the email is about, e.g. 'monthly sales summary', 'overdue payments reminder'

prompts.name: analyze_data
prompts.description: Analyze your business data and get insights, trends and recommendations

arguments.name: question
arguments.description: What you want to analyze, e.g. 'sales trend this quarter', 'top clients by revenue'

resources.name: schema
resources.description: Complete database schema with all tables, columns, types and relationships

resources.name: views
resources.description: List of configured views (kanban, calendar, dashboard, chart, etc.)

resources.name: templates
resources.description: 26 industry templates available for installation (CRM, Hotel, Restaurant, Clinic, etc.)
